G1.meaning: <meaning><def>the first letter of the alphabet</def>; figuratively, only (from its use as a numeral) the first:</meaning>

G2105.source: <source>feminine from G2095 (εὖ) and the alternate of G2203 (Ζεύς) (as the god of the weather);</source>

G2106.meaning: <meaning><def>to think well of</def>, i.e. approve (an act); specially, to approbate (a person or thing)</meaning>
G2106.usage: <usage>think good, (be well) please(-d), be the good (have, take) pleasure, be willing.</usage>

G2107.source: <source>from a presumed compound of G2095 (εὖ) and the base of G1380 (δοκέω);</source>
G2107.meaning: <meaning><def>satisfaction</def>, i.e. (subjectively) delight, or (objectively) kindness, wish, purpose</meaning>

G2110.source: <source>from G2095 (εὖ) and the base of G2041 (ἔργον);</source>
G2110.meaning: <meaning><def>a worker of good</def>, i.e. (specially) a philanthropist</meaning>

G2111.source: <source>from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι);</source>

G2112.usage: <usage>anon, as soon as, forthwith, immediately, shortly, straightway.</usage>

G2113.meaning: <meaning><def>to lay a straight course</def>, i.e. sail direct</meaning>

G2114.meaning: <meaning><def>to cheer up</def>, i.e. (intransitively) be cheerful; neuter comparative (adverbially) more cheerfully</meaning>

G2117.meaning: <meaning><def>straight</def>, i.e. (literally) level, or (figuratively) true; adverbially (of time) at once</meaning>
G2117.usage: <usage>anon, by and by, forthwith, immediately, straightway.</usage>

G2119.meaning: <meaning><def>to have good time</def>, i.e. opportunity or leisure</meaning>

G2123.source: <source>comparative of a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G2873 (κόπος);</source>

G2124.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, caution, i.e. (religiously) reverence (piety); by implication, dread (concretely)</meaning>

G2125.meaning: <meaning><def>to be circumspect</def>, i.e. (by implication) to be apprehensive; religiously, to reverence</meaning>

G2127.source: <source>from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G3056 (λόγος);</source>
G2127.meaning: <meaning><def>to speak well of</def>, i.e. (religiously) to bless (thank or invoke a benediction upon, prosper)</meaning>

G2129.meaning: <meaning><def>fine speaking</def>, i.e. elegance of language; commendation ("eulogy"), i.e. (reverentially) adoration; religiously, benediction; by implication, consecration; by extension, benefit or largess</meaning>

G2130.source: <source>from G2095 (εὖ) and a presumed derivative of G3330 (μεταδίδωμι);</source>

G2132.source: <source>from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G3563 (νοῦς);</source>

G2135.meaning: <meaning><def>a castrated person</def> (such being employed in Oriental bed-chambers); by extension an impotent or unmarried man; by implication, a chamberlain (state-officer)</meaning>

G2137.source: <source>from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G3598 (ὁδός);</source>
G2137.meaning: <meaning><def>to help on the road</def>, i.e. (passively) succeed in reaching; figuratively, to succeed in business affairs</meaning>

G2139.source: <source>from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of a presumed compound of G4012 (περί) and G2476 (ἵστημι);</source>
G2139.meaning: <meaning><def>well standing around</def>, i.e. (a competitor) thwarting (a racer) in every direction (figuratively, of sin in genitive case)</meaning>

G2140.source: <source>from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G4160 (ποιέω);</source>

G2141.source: <source>from a compound of G2090 (ἑτοιμάζω) and the base of G4197 (πορεία);</source>
G2141.meaning: <meaning><def>(intransitively) to be good for passing through</def>, i.e. (figuratively) have pecuniary means</meaning>

G2143.source: <source>from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G4241 (πρέπω);</source>

G2144.source: <source>from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G4327 (προσδέχομαι);</source>

G2145.source: <source>from G2095 (εὖ) and the same as G4332 (προσεδρεύω);</source>
G2145.meaning: <meaning><def>sitting well towards</def>, i.e. (figuratively) assiduous (neuter, diligent service)</meaning>

G2146.source: <source>from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G4383 (πρόσωπον);</source>
G2146.meaning: <meaning><def>to be of good countenance</def>, i.e. (figuratively) to make a display</meaning>

G2147.source: <source>a prolonged form of a primary , which (together with another cognate form) is used for it in all the tenses except the present and imperfect;</source>

G2148.meaning: <meaning><def>a storm from the East</def> (or southeast), i.e. (in modern phrase) a Levanter</meaning>

G2151.meaning: <meaning><def>to be pious</def>, i.e. (towards God) to worship, or (towards parents) to respect (support)</meaning>

G2154.source: <source>from G2095 (εὖ) and the base of G4591 (σημαίνω);</source>

G2159.source: <source>adverb from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of (to stretch);</source>
G2159.meaning: <meaning><def>in a well-strung manner</def>, i.e. (figuratively) intensely (in a good sense, cogently; in a bad one, fiercely)</meaning>

G2160.source: <source>from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of the base of G5157 (τροπή) (meaning well-turned, i.e. ready at repartee, jocose);</source>

G2161.source: <source>from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G5177 (τυγχάνω);</source>
G2161.meaning: <meaning><def>well- fated</def>, i.e. fortunate; Eutychus, a young man</meaning>

G2165.meaning: <meaning><def>to put</def> (middle voice or passively, be) in a good frame of mind, i.e. rejoice</meaning>

G2168.meaning: <meaning><def>to be grateful</def>, i.e. (actively) to express gratitude (towards); specially, to say grace at a meal</meaning>

G2169.meaning: <meaning><def>gratitude</def>; actively, grateful language (to God, as an act of worship)</meaning>

G2170.source: <source>from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G5483 (χαρίζομαι);</source>

G2171.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, a wish, expressed as a petition to God, or in votive obligation</meaning>

G2172.meaning: <meaning><def>to wish</def>; by implication, to pray to God</meaning>

G2174.source: <source>from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G5590 (ψυχή);</source>
G2174.meaning: <meaning><def>to be in good spirits</def>, i.e. feel encouraged</meaning>

G2175.source: <source>from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G3605 (ὄζω);</source>

G2176.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, well-named (good-omened), i.e. the left (which was the lucky side among the pagan Greeks); neuter as adverbial, at the left hand</meaning>

G2182.source: <source>from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G2147 (εὑρίσκω);</source>

G2183.meaning: <meaning><def>diurnality</def>, i.e. (specially) the quotidian rotation or class of the Jewish priests' service at the Temple, as distributed by families</meaning>

G2185.source: <source>from G1909 (ἐπί) and a cognate of G2240 (ἥκω);</source>

G2186.meaning: <meaning><def>to stand upon</def>, i.e. be present (in various applications, friendly or otherwise, usually literal);</meaning>
G2186.usage: <usage>--assault, come (in, to, unto, upon), be at hand (instant), present, stand (before, by, over).</usage>

G2189.meaning: <meaning><def>hostility</def>; by implication, a reason for opposition</meaning>

G2190.meaning: <meaning><def>hateful</def> (passively, odious, or actively, hostile); usually as a noun, an adversary (especially Satan)</meaning>

G2191.meaning: <meaning><def>an adder or other poisonous snake</def> (literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G2192.meaning: <meaning><def>to hold</def> (used in very various applications, literally or figuratively, direct or remote; such as possession; ability, contiuity, relation, or condition)</meaning>
G2192.usage: <usage>be (able, X hold, possessed with), accompany, + begin to amend, can(+ -not), X conceive, count, diseased, do + eat, + enjoy, + fear, following, have, hold, keep, + lack, + go to law, lie, + must needs, + of necessity, + need, next, + recover, + reign, + rest, + return, X sick, take for, + tremble, + uncircumcised, use.</usage>

G2193.meaning: <meaning><def>a conjunction</def>, preposition and adverb of continuance, until (of time and place)</meaning>
G2193.usage: <usage>even (until, unto), (as) far (as), how long, (un-)til(-l), (hither-, un-, up) to, while(-s).</usage>

G2197.meaning: <meaning><def>Zacharias</def> (i.e. Zechariah), the name of two Israelites</meaning>

G2201.meaning: <meaning><def>a couple</def>, i.e. a team (of oxen yoked together) or brace (of birds tied together)</meaning>

G2202.source: <source>feminine of a derivative (at the second stage) from the same as G2218 (ζυγός);</source>

G2203.meaning: <meaning><def>in the oblique cases there is used instead of it a</def> (probably cognate) name , which is otherwise obsolete; Zeus or Dis (among the Latins, Jupiter or Jove), the supreme deity of the Greeks</meaning>

G2204.meaning: <meaning><def>to be hot</def> (boil, of liquids; or glow, of solids), i.e. (figuratively) be fervid (earnest)</meaning>

G2205.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, heat, i.e. (figuratively) "zeal" (in a favorable sense, ardor; in an unfavorable one, jealousy, as of a husband (figuratively, of God), or an enemy, malice)</meaning>
G2205.usage: <usage>emulation, envy(-ing), fervent mind, indignation, jealousy, zeal.</usage>

G2206.meaning: <meaning><def>to have warmth of feeling for or against</def></meaning>
G2206.usage: <usage>affect, covet (earnestly), (have) desire, (move with) envy, be jealous over, (be) zealous(-ly affect).</usage>

G2208.meaning: <meaning><def>a Zealot</def>, i.e. (specially) partisan for Jewish political independence</meaning>

G2209.source: <source>probably akin to the base of G1150 (δαμάζω) (through the idea of violence);</source>

G2210.meaning: <meaning><def>to injure</def>, i.e. (reflexively or passively) to experience detriment</meaning>
G2210.usage: <usage>be cast away, receive damage, lose, suffer loss.</usage>

G2211.source: <source>probably contracted from a poetic form of G2203 (Ζεύς) and G1435 (δῶρον);</source>

G2212.meaning: <meaning><def>to seek</def> (literally or figuratively); specially, (by Hebraism) to worship (God), or (in a bad sense) to plot (against life)</meaning>
G2212.usage: <usage>be (go) about, desire, endeavour, enquire (for), require, (X will) seek (after, for, means).</usage>

G2213.meaning: <meaning><def>a search</def> (properly concretely), i.e. (in words) a debate</meaning>

G2214.meaning: <meaning><def>a searching</def> (properly, the act), i.e. a dispute or its theme</meaning>

G2218.source: <source>from the root of (to join, especially by a "yoke");</source>
G2218.meaning: <meaning><def>a coupling</def>, i.e. (figuratively) servitude (a law or obligation); also (literally) the beam of the balance (as connecting the scales)</meaning>

G2221.source: <source>from the same as G2226 (ζῶον) and G64 (ἀγρεύω);</source>
G2221.meaning: <meaning><def>to take alive</def> (make a prisoner of war), i.e. (figuratively) to capture or ensnare</meaning>

G2223.source: <source>probably akin to the base of G2218 (ζυγός);</source>

G2225.source: <source>from the same as G2226 (ζῶον) and a derivative of G1096 (γίνομαι);</source>
G2225.meaning: <meaning><def>to engender alive</def>, i.e. (by analogy) to rescue (passively, be saved) from death</meaning>

G2227.source: <source>from the same as G2226 (ζῶον) and G4160 (ποιέω);</source>

G2228.source: <source>a primary particle of distinction between two connected terms;</source>
G2228.usage: <usage>and, but (either), (n-)either, except it be, (n-)or (else), rather, save, than, that, what, yea.</usage>

G2229.source: <source>an adverb of confirmation; perhaps intensive of G2228 (ἤ); used only (in the New Testament) before G3303 (μέν);</source>

G2232.meaning: <meaning><def>a leader</def>, i.e. chief person (or figuratively, place) of a province</meaning>

G2233.source: <source>middle voice of a (presumed) strengthened form of G71 (ἄγω);</source>
G2233.meaning: <meaning><def>to lead</def>, i.e. command (with official authority); figuratively, to deem, i.e. consider</meaning>
G2233.usage: <usage>account, (be) chief, count, esteem, governor, judge, have the rule over, suppose, think.</usage>

G2234.source: <source>adverb from a derivative of the base of G2237 (ἡδονή);</source>

G2235.source: <source>apparently from G2228 (ἤ) (or possibly G2229 (ἦ)) and G1211 (δή);</source>

G2236.source: <source>neuter plural of the superlative of the same as G2234 (ἡδέως);</source>

G2238.source: <source>neuter of the compound of the same as G2234 (ἡδέως) and G3744 (ὀσμή);</source>

G2240.meaning: <meaning><def>to arrive</def>, i.e. be present (literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G2245.source: <source>from (a comrade, i.e. one of the same age);</source>

G2246.meaning: <meaning><def>perhaps akin to the alternate of G138</def> (αἱρέομαι)); the sun; by implication, light</meaning>

G2250.source: <source>feminine (with G5610 (ὥρα) implied) of a derivative of (to sit; akin to the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος)) meaning tame, i.e. gentle;</source>
G2250.meaning: <meaning><def>day</def>, i.e. (literally) the time space between dawn and dark, or the whole 24 hours (but several days were usually reckoned by the Jews as inclusive of the parts of both extremes); figuratively, a period (always defined more or less clearly by the context)</meaning>
G2250.usage: <usage>age, + alway, (mid-)day (by day, (-ly)), + for ever, judgment, (day) time, while, years.</usage>

G2253.source: <source>from a presumed compound of the base of G2255 (ἥμισυ) and G2348 (θνήσκω);</source>

G2255.source: <source>neuter of a derivative from an inseparable prefix akin to G260 (ἅμα) (through the idea of partition involved in connection) and meaning semi-;</source>

G2256.source: <source>from the base of G2255 (ἥμισυ) and G5610 (ὥρα);</source>

G2258.usage: <usage>+ agree, be, X have (+ charge of), hold, use, was(-t), were.</usage>

G2260.meaning: <meaning><def>than at all</def> (or than perhaps, than indeed)</meaning>

G2263.source: <source>perhaps by transposition from G2048 (ἔρημος) (through the idea of stillness);</source>

G2264.meaning: <meaning><def>heroic</def>; Herod, the name of four Jewish kings</meaning>

G2266.meaning: <meaning><def>Herodias</def>, a woman of the Heodian family</meaning>

G2270.meaning: <meaning><def>to keep still</def> (intransitively), i.e. refrain from labor, meddlesomeness or speech</meaning>

G2271.meaning: <meaning><def>(as noun) stillness</def>, i.e. desistance from bustle or language</meaning>

G2272.source: <source>a prolonged form of a compound probably of a derivative of the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος) and perhaps G2192 (ἔχω);</source>
G2272.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, keeping one's seat (sedentary), i.e. (by implication) still (undisturbed, undisturbing)</meaning>

G2274.meaning: <meaning><def>to make worse</def>, i.e. vanquish (literally or figuratively); by implication, to rate lower</meaning>

G2276.source: <source>neuter of comparative of (slightly) used for that of G2556 (κακός);</source>

G2278.meaning: <meaning><def>to make a loud noise</def>, i.e. reverberate</meaning>

G2279.meaning: <meaning><def>a loud or confused noise</def> ("echo"), i.e. roar; figuratively, a rumor</meaning>

G2287.source: <source>from (the feminine form of) G2288 (θάνατος) and G5342 (φέρω);</source>

G2288.meaning: <meaning><def>(properly</def>, an adjective used as a noun) death (literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G2289.usage: <usage>become dead, (cause to be) put to death, kill, mortify.</usage>

G2292.usage: <usage>be bold, X boldly, have confidence, be confident.</usage>

G2300.source: <source>a prolonged form of a primary verb;</source>
G2300.meaning: <meaning><def>to look closely at</def>, i.e. (by implication) perceive (literally or figuratively); by extension to visit</meaning>

G2302.meaning: <meaning><def>a place for public show</def> ("theatre"), i.e. general audience-room; by implication, a show itself (figuratively)</meaning>

G2303.source: <source>probably neuter of G2304 (θεῖος) (in its original sense of flashing);</source>

G2307.meaning: <meaning><def>a determination</def> (properly, the thing), i.e. (actively) choice (specially, purpose, decree; abstractly, volition) or (passively) inclination</meaning>

G2309.source: <source>apparently strengthened from the alternate form of G138 (αἱρέομαι);</source>
G2309.meaning: <meaning><def>to determine</def> (as an active option from subjective impulse; whereas G1014 (βούλομαι) properly denotes rather a passive acquiescence in objective considerations), i.e. choose or prefer (literally or figuratively); by implication, to wish, i.e. be inclined to (sometimes adverbially, gladly); impersonally for the future tense, to be about to; by Hebraism, to delight in</meaning>
G2309.usage: <usage>desire, be disposed (forward), intend, list, love, mean, please, have rather, (be) will (have, -ling, - ling(-ly)).</usage>

G2310.meaning: <meaning><def>something put down</def>, i.e. a substruction (of a building, etc.), (literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G2311.meaning: <meaning><def>to lay a basis for</def>, i.e. (literally) erect, or (figuratively) consolidate</meaning>

G2315.source: <source>from G2316 (θεός) and a presumed derivative of G4154 (πνέω);</source>

G2316.source: <source>of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;</source>

G2319.source: <source>from G2316 (θεός) and the base of G4767 (στυγνητός);</source>

G2322.meaning: <meaning><def>attendance</def> (specially, medical, i.e. cure); figuratively and collectively, domestics</meaning>

G2323.meaning: <meaning><def>to wait upon menially</def>, i.e. (figuratively) to adore (God), or (specially) to relieve (of disease)</meaning>

G2324.source: <source>apparently a participle from an otherwise obsolete derivative of the base of G2330 (θέρος);</source>

G2325.source: <source>from G2330 (θέρος) (in the sense of the crop);</source>

G2334.source: <source>from a derivative of G2300 (θεάομαι) (perhaps by addition of G3708 (ὁράω));</source>
G2334.meaning: <meaning><def>to be a spectator of</def>, i.e. discern, (literally, figuratively (experience) or intensively (acknowledge))</meaning>

G2340.meaning: <meaning><def>to hunt</def> (an animal), i.e. (figuratively) to carp at</meaning>

G2341.source: <source>from a compound of G2342 (θηρίον) and G3164 (μάχομαι);</source>
G2341.meaning: <meaning><def>to be a beast-fighter</def> (in the gladiatorial show), i.e. (figuratively) to encounter (furious men)</meaning>

G2345.source: <source>a prolonged form of an obsolete primary (to finger);</source>
G2345.meaning: <meaning><def>to manipulate</def>, i.e. have to do with; by implication, to injure</meaning>

G2348.source: <source>a strengthened form of a simpler primary (which is used for it only in certain tenses);</source>

G2350.meaning: <meaning><def>to be in tumult</def>, i.e. disturb, clamor</meaning>
G2350.usage: <usage>make ado (a noise), trouble self, set on an uproar.</usage>

G2358.source: <source>from a prolonged compound of the base of G2360 (θροέω);</source>
G2358.meaning: <meaning><def>and a derivative of G680</def> (ἅπτομαι) (meaning a noisy iambus, sung in honor of Bacchus); to make an acclamatory procession, i.e. (figuratively) to conquer or (by Hebraism) to give victory</meaning>

G2361.source: <source>perhaps from G5142 (τρέφω) (in the sense of thickening);</source>

G2362.meaning: <meaning><def>a stately seat</def> ("throne"); by implication, power or (concretely) a potentate</meaning>

G2364.meaning: <meaning><def>a female child</def>, or (by Hebraism) descendant (or inhabitant)</meaning>

G2366.source: <source>from G2380 (θύω) (in the sense of blowing) a storm</source>

G2367.source: <source>from a derivative of G2380 (θύω) (in the sense of blowing;</source>
G2367.meaning: <meaning><def>denoting a certain fragrant tree)</def>; made of citron-wood</meaning>

G2368.meaning: <meaning><def>an aroma</def>, i.e. fragrant powder burnt in religious service; by implication, the burning itself</meaning>

G2369.meaning: <meaning><def>a place of fumigation</def>, i.e. the alter of incense (in the Temple)</meaning>

G2370.source: <source>from a derivative of G2380 (θύω) (in the sense of smoking);</source>

G2371.source: <source>from a presumed compound of G2372 (θυμός) and G3164 (μάχομαι);</source>
G2371.meaning: <meaning><def>to be in a furious fight</def>, i.e. (figuratively) to be exasperated</meaning>

G2373.meaning: <meaning><def>to put in a passion</def>, i.e. enrage</meaning>

G2374.meaning: <meaning><def>a portal or entrance</def> (the opening or the closure, literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G2378.meaning: <meaning><def>sacrifice</def> (the act or the victim, literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G2379.meaning: <meaning><def>a place of sacrifice</def>, i.e. an altar (special or genitive case, literal or figurative)</meaning>

G2380.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, to rush (breathe hard, blow, smoke), i.e. (by implication) to sacrifice (properly, by fire, but genitive case); by extension to immolate (slaughter for any purpose)</meaning>

G2384.meaning: <meaning><def>Jacob</def> (i.e. Ja`akob), the progenitor of the Israelites</meaning>

G2390.source: <source>middle voice of apparently a primary verb;</source>

G2396.source: <source>second person singular imperative active of G1492 (εἴδω);</source>
G2396.meaning: <meaning><def>used as an interjection to denote surprise</def>; lo!</meaning>

G2398.meaning: <meaning><def>pertaining to self</def>, i.e. one's own; by implication, private or separate</meaning>
G2398.usage: <usage>X his acquaintance, when they were alone, apart, aside, due, his (own, proper, several), home, (her, our, thine, your) own (business), private(-ly), proper, severally, their (own).</usage>

G2399.meaning: <meaning><def>a private person</def>, i.e. (by implication) an ignoramus (compare "idiot")</meaning>

G2400.source: <source>second person singular imperative middle voice of G1492 (εἴδω);</source>

G2401.meaning: <meaning><def>Idumæa</def> (i.e. Edom), a region East (and South) of Palestine</meaning>

G2402.source: <source>a strengthened form of a primary idos (sweat);</source>

G2403.meaning: <meaning><def>Jezabel</def> (i.e. Jezebel), a Tyrian woman (used as a synonym of a termagant or false teacher)</meaning>

G2404.meaning: <meaning><def>holy city</def>; Hierapolis, a place in Asia Minor</meaning>

G2407.meaning: <meaning><def>to be a priest</def>, i.e. perform his functions</meaning>

G2411.meaning: <meaning><def>a sacred place</def>, i.e. the entire precincts (whereas G3485 (ναός) denotes the central sanctuary itself) of the Temple (at Jerusalem or elsewhere)</meaning>

G2412.source: <source>from G2413 (ἱερός) and the same as G4241 (πρέπω);</source>

G2418.source: <source>from a compound of G2411 (ἱερόν) and the base of G2041 (ἔργον);</source>
G2418.meaning: <meaning><def>to be a temple-worker</def>, i.e. officiate as a priest (figuratively)</meaning>

G2424.meaning: <meaning><def>Jesus</def> (i.e. Jehoshua), the name of our Lord and two (three) other Israelites</meaning>

G2425.meaning: <meaning><def>competent</def> (as if coming in season), i.e. ample (in amount) or fit (in character)</meaning>
G2425.usage: <usage>able, + content, enough, good, great, large, long (while), many, meet, much, security, sore, sufficient, worthy.</usage>

G2428.source: <source>from a derivative of the base of G2425 (ἱκανός) (through the idea of approaching for a favor);</source>

G2430.meaning: <meaning><def>image-like</def>; Iconium, a place in Asia Minor</meaning>

G2431.meaning: <meaning><def>propitious or merry</def> ("hilarious"), i.e. prompt or willing</meaning>

G2433.source: <source>middle voice from the same as G2436 (ἵλεως);</source>
G2433.meaning: <meaning><def>to conciliate</def>, i.e. (transitively) to atone for (sin), or (intransitively) be propitious</meaning>

G2435.meaning: <meaning><def>an expiatory</def> (place or thing), i.e. (concretely) an atoning victim, or (specially) the lid of the Ark (in the Temple)</meaning>

G3643.meaning: <meaning><def>to have little regard for</def>, i.e. to disesteem</meaning>

G3646.source: <source>from a derivative of a compound of G3650 (ὅλος) and a derivative of G2545 (καίω);</source>

G3648.meaning: <meaning><def>complete in every part</def>, i.e. perfectly sound (in body)</meaning>

G3650.meaning: <meaning><def>"whole" or "all"</def>, i.e. complete (in extent, amount, time or degree), especially (neuter) as noun or adverb</meaning>

G3651.meaning: <meaning><def>complete to the end</def>, i.e. absolutely perfect</meaning>

G3654.meaning: <meaning><def>completely</def>, i.e. altogether; (by analogy), everywhere; (negatively) not by any means</meaning>

G3656.meaning: <meaning><def>to be in company with</def>, i.e. (by implication) to converse</meaning>

G3658.source: <source>from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and a derivative of the alternate of G138 (αἱρέομαι) (meaning a crowd);</source>

G3660.source: <source>a prolonged form of a primary, but obsolete , for which another prolonged form is used in certain tenses;</source>
G3660.meaning: <meaning><def>to swear</def>, i.e. take (or declare on) oath</meaning>

G3661.source: <source>adverb from a compound of the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G2372 (θυμός);</source>

G3663.source: <source>from G3664 (ὅμοιος) and the alternate of G3958 (πάσχω);</source>

G3666.meaning: <meaning><def>to assimilate</def>, i.e. compare; passively, to become similar</meaning>

G3670.source: <source>from a compound of the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G3056 (λόγος);</source>
G3670.usage: <usage>con- (pro-)fess, confession is made, give thanks, promise.</usage>

G3672.source: <source>adverb of present passive participle of G3670 (ὁμολογέω);</source>

G3673.source: <source>from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G5078 (τέχνη);</source>

G3674.meaning: <meaning><def>akin to G260</def> (ἅμα)) as adverb; at the same place or time</meaning>

G3675.source: <source>from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G5424 (φρήν);</source>

G3676.meaning: <meaning><def>at the same time</def>, i.e. (conjunctionally) notwithstanding, yet still</meaning>

G3678.source: <source>neuter of a presumed derivative of G3688 (ὄνος);</source>

G3679.meaning: <meaning><def>to defame</def>, i.e. rail at, chide, taunt</meaning>

G3681.source: <source>probably akin to the base of G3686 (ὄνομα);</source>

G3683.source: <source>from a derivative of G3685 (ὀνίνημι) and G5411 (φόρος);</source>

G3684.meaning: <meaning><def>belonging to a ass</def>, i.e. large (so as to be turned by a ass)</meaning>

G3685.source: <source>a prolonged form of an apparently primary verb (, to slur);</source>
G3685.meaning: <meaning><def>for which another prolonged form</def> () is used as an alternate in some tenses (unless indeed it be identical with the base of G3686 (ὄνομα) through the idea of notoriety); to gratify, i.e. (middle voice) to derive pleasure or advantage from</meaning>

G3686.source: <source>from a presumed derivative of the base of G1097 (γινώσκω) (compare G3685 (ὀνίνημι));</source>

G3687.meaning: <meaning><def>to name</def>, i.e. assign an appellation; by extension, to utter, mention, profess</meaning>

G3689.source: <source>adverb of the oblique cases of G5607 (ὤν);</source>
G3689.usage: <usage>certainly, clean, indeed, of a truth, verily.</usage>

G3691.source: <source>probably akin to the base of G188 (ἀκμήν) ("acid");</source>

G3692.meaning: <meaning><def>a hole</def> (as if for light), i.e. cavern; by analogy, a spring (of water)</meaning>

G3693.meaning: <meaning><def>from G3700</def> (ὀπτάνομαι)) with enclitic of source; from the rear (as a secure aspect), i.e. at the back (adverb and preposition of place or time)</meaning>

G3694.source: <source>from the same as G3693 (ὄπισθεν) with enclitic of direction;</source>
G3694.meaning: <meaning><def>to the back</def>, i.e. aback (as adverb or preposition of time or place; or as noun)</meaning>

G3696.source: <source>probably from a primary (to be busy about);</source>
G3696.meaning: <meaning><def>an implement or utensil or tool</def> (literally or figuratively, especially, offensive for war)</meaning>

G3697.meaning: <meaning><def>of what kind that</def>, i.e. how (as) great (excellent) (specially, as an indefinite correlative to the definite antecedent G5108 (τοιοῦτος) of quality)</meaning>

G3698.meaning: <meaning><def>what(-ever) then</def>, i.e. (of time) as soon as</meaning>

G3700.source: <source>a (middle voice) prolonged form of the primary (middle voice) ; which is used for it in certain tenses; and both as alternate of G3708 (ὁράω);</source>
G3700.meaning: <meaning><def>to gaze</def> (i.e. with wide-open eyes, as at something remarkable; and thus differing from G991 (βλέπω), which denotes simply voluntary observation; and from G1492 (εἴδω), which expresses merely mechanical, passive or casual vision; while G2300 (θεάομαι), and still more emphatically its intensive G2334 (θεωρέω), signifies an earnest but more continued inspection; and G4648 (σκοπέω) a watching from a distance)</meaning>

G3703.source: <source>apparently from the base of G3796 (ὀψέ) and G5610 (ὥρα);</source>
G3703.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, even-tide of the (summer) season (dog-days), i.e. (by implication) ripe fruit</meaning>

G3704.meaning: <meaning><def>what(-ever) how</def>, i.e. in the manner that (as adverb or conjunction of coincidence, intentional or actual)</meaning>

G3705.meaning: <meaning><def>something gazed at</def>, i.e. a spectacle (especially supernatural)</meaning>

G3706.meaning: <meaning><def>the act of gazing</def>, i.e. (externally) an aspect or (internally) an inspired appearance</meaning>

G3707.meaning: <meaning><def>gazed at</def>, i.e. (by implication) capable of being seen</meaning>

G3708.source: <source>properly, to stare at (compare G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)), i.e. (by implication) to discern clearly (physically or mentally);</source>
G3708.meaning: <meaning><def>by extension</def>, to attend to; by Hebraism, to experience; passively, to appear</meaning>

G3709.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, desire (as a reaching forth or excitement of the mind), i.e. (by analogy), violent passion (ire, or (justifiable) abhorrence); by implication punishment</meaning>

G3710.meaning: <meaning><def>to provoke or enrage</def>, i.e. (passively) become exasperated</meaning>

G3712.meaning: <meaning><def>a stretch of the arms</def>, i.e. a fathom</meaning>

G3713.source: <source>middle voice of apparently a prolonged form of an obsolete primary (compare G3735 (ὄρος));</source>
G3713.meaning: <meaning><def>to stretch oneself</def>, i.e. reach out after (long for)</meaning>

G3714.meaning: <meaning><def>mountainous</def>, i.e. (feminine by implication, of G5561 (χώρα)) the Highlands (of Judæa)</meaning>

G3715.meaning: <meaning><def>excitement of the mind</def>, i.e. longing after</meaning>

G3716.source: <source>from a compound of G3717 (ὀρθός) and G4228 (πούς);</source>
G3716.meaning: <meaning><def>to be straight-footed</def>, i.e. (figuratively) to go directly forward</meaning>

G3717.meaning: <meaning><def>right</def> (as rising), i.e. (perpendicularly) erect (figuratively, honest), or (horizontally) level or direct</meaning>

G3718.source: <source>from a compound of G3717 (ὀρθός) and the base of G5114 (τομώτερος), to make a straight cut, i.e. (figuratively) to dissect (expound) correctly (the divine message)</source>

G3719.meaning: <meaning><def>to use the dawn</def>, i.e. (by implication) to repair betimes</meaning>

G3720.meaning: <meaning><def>relating to the dawn</def>, i.e. matutinal (as an epithet of Venus, especially brilliant in the early day)</meaning>

G3721.meaning: <meaning><def>in the dawn</def>, i.e. up at day-break</meaning>

G3722.meaning: <meaning><def>dawn</def> (as sun-rise, rising of light); by extension, morn</meaning>

G3723.meaning: <meaning><def>in a straight manner</def>, i.e. (figuratively) correctly (also morally)</meaning>

G3724.meaning: <meaning><def>to mark out or bound</def> ("horizon"), i.e. (figuratively) to appoint, decree, specify</meaning>

G3725.source: <source>neuter of a derivative of an apparently primary (a bound or limit);</source>

G3726.meaning: <meaning><def>to put on oath</def>, i.e. make swear; by analogy, to solemnly enjoin</meaning>

G3727.meaning: <meaning><def>perhaps akin to G3725</def> (ὅριον)); a limit, i.e. (sacred) restraint (specially, an oath)</meaning>

G3728.source: <source>from a compound of G3727 (ὅρκος) and a derivative of G3660 (ὀμνύω);</source>

G3729.meaning: <meaning><def>to start</def>, spur or urge on, i.e. (reflexively) to dash or plunge</meaning>

G3732.source: <source>neuter of a presumed derivative of G3733 (ὄρνις);</source>

G3733.source: <source>probably from a prolonged form of the base of G3735 (ὄρος);</source>
G3733.meaning: <meaning><def>a bird</def> (as rising in the air), i.e. (specially), a hen (or female domestic fowl)</meaning>

G3734.source: <source>from a compound of the base of G3725 (ὅριον) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι);</source>

G3735.meaning: <meaning><def>perhaps akin to G142</def> (αἴρω); compare G3733 (ὄρνις)); a mountain (as lifting itself above the plain)</meaning>

G3738.meaning: <meaning><def>to dance</def> (from the ranklike or regular motion)</meaning>

G3739.source: <source>probably a primary word (or perhaps a form of the article G3588 (ὁ));</source>
G3739.meaning: <meaning><def>the relatively</def> (sometimes demonstrative) pronoun, who, which, what, that</meaning>
G3739.usage: <usage>one, (an-, the) other, some, that, what, which, who(-m, -se), etc.</usage>

G3740.meaning: <meaning><def>how</def> (i.e. with G302 (ἄν), so) many times as</meaning>

G3741.source: <source>of uncertain affinity; properly, right (by intrinsic or divine character; thus distinguished from 1342, which refers rather to human statutes and relations; from G2413 (ἱερός), which denotes formal consecration;</source>
G3741.meaning: <meaning><def>and from G40</def> (ἅγιος), which relates to purity from defilement), i.e. hallowed (pious, sacred, sure)</meaning>

G3745.usage: <usage>all (that), as (long, many, much) (as), how great (many, much), (in-)asmuch as, so many as, that (ever), the more, those things, what (great, -soever), wheresoever, wherewithsoever, which, X while, who(-soever).</usage>

G3748.meaning: <meaning><def>which some</def>, i.e. any that; also (definite) which same</meaning>
G3748.usage: <usage>X and (they), (such) as, (they) that, in that they, what(-soever), whereas ye, (they) which, who(-soever).</usage>

G3751.meaning: <meaning><def>the loin</def> (externally), i.e. the hip; internally (by extension) procreative power</meaning>

G3752.meaning: <meaning><def>whenever</def> (implying hypothesis or more or less uncertainty); also causatively (conjunctionally) inasmuch as</meaning>
G3752.usage: <usage>as long (soon) as, that, + till, when(-soever), while.</usage>

G3753.usage: <usage>after (that), as soon as, that, when, while.</usage>

G3754.usage: <usage>as concerning that, as though, because (that), for (that), how (that), (in) that, though, why.</usage>

G3755.source: <source>for the genitive case of G3748 (ὅστις) (as adverb);</source>

G3756.meaning: <meaning><def>the absolute negative</def> (compare G3361 (μή)) adverb; no or not</meaning>
G3756.usage: <usage>+ long, nay, neither, never, no (X man), none, (can-)not, + nothing, + special, un(-worthy), when, + without, + yet but.</usage>

G3761.meaning: <meaning><def>not however</def>, i.e. neither, nor, not even</meaning>
G3761.usage: <usage>neither (indeed), never, no (more, nor, not), nor (yet), (also, even, then) not (even, so much as), + nothing, so much as.</usage>

G3762.meaning: <meaning><def>not even one</def> (man, woman or thing), i.e. none, nobody, nothing</meaning>
G3762.usage: <usage>any (man), aught, man, neither any (thing), never (man), no (man), none (+ of these things), not (any, at all, -thing), nought.</usage>

G3763.meaning: <meaning><def>not even at any time</def>, i.e. never at all</meaning>
G3763.usage: <usage>neither at any time, never, nothing at any time.</usage>

G3765.usage: <usage>after that (not), (not) any more, henceforth (hereafter) not, no longer (more), not as yet (now), now no more (not), yet (not).</usage>

G3766.meaning: <meaning><def>is it not therefore that</def>, i.e. (affirmatively) hence or so</meaning>

G3767.usage: <usage>and (so, truly), but, now (then), so (likewise then), then, therefore, verily, wherefore.</usage>

G3770.meaning: <meaning><def>celestial</def>, i.e. belonging to or coming from the sky</meaning>

G3771.source: <source>from G3772 (οὐρανός) and the enclitic of source;</source>

G3772.source: <source>perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);</source>
G3772.meaning: <meaning><def>the sky</def>; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)</meaning>

G3777.meaning: <meaning><def>not too</def>, i.e. neither or nor; by analogy, not even</meaning>

G3778.meaning: <meaning><def>the he</def> (she or it), i.e. this or that (often with article repeated)</meaning>
G3778.usage: <usage>he (it was that), hereof, it, she, such as, the same, these, they, this (man, same, woman), which, who.</usage>

G3779.meaning: <meaning><def>in this way</def> (referring to what precedes or follows)</meaning>
G3779.usage: <usage>after that, after (in) this manner, as, even (so), for all that, like(-wise), no more, on this fashion(-wise), so (in like manner), thus, what.</usage>

G3781.meaning: <meaning><def>an ower</def>, i.e. person indebted; figuratively, a delinquent; morally, a transgressor (against God)</meaning>

G3782.meaning: <meaning><def>indebtedness</def>, i.e. (concretely) a sum owed; figuratively, obligation, i.e. (conjugal) duty</meaning>

G3783.meaning: <meaning><def>something owed</def>, i.e. (figuratively) a due; morally, a fault</meaning>

G3784.source: <source>probably from the base of G3786 (ὄφελος) (through the idea of accruing);</source>
G3784.meaning: <meaning><def>to owe</def> (pecuniarily); figuratively, to be under obligation (ought, must, should); morally, to fail in duty</meaning>
G3784.usage: <usage>behove, be bound, (be) debt(-or), (be) due(-ty), be guilty (indebted), (must) need(-s), ought, owe, should.</usage>

G3785.source: <source>first person singular of a past tense of G3784 (ὀφείλω);</source>

G3786.source: <source>from (to heap up, i.e. accumulate or benefit);</source>

G3788.meaning: <meaning><def>the eye</def> (literally or figuratively); by implication, vision; figuratively, envy (from the jealous side-glance)</meaning>

G3789.source: <source>probably from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) (through the idea of sharpness of vision);</source>
G3789.meaning: <meaning><def>a snake</def>, figuratively, (as a type of sly cunning) an artful malicious person, especially Satan</meaning>

G3790.source: <source>perhaps from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) (through the idea of the shading or proximity to the organ of vision);</source>
G3790.meaning: <meaning><def>the eye-"brow" or forehead</def>, i.e. (figuratively) the brink of a precipice</meaning>

G3792.meaning: <meaning><def>to make a crowd</def>, i.e. raise a public disturbance</meaning>

G3793.source: <source>from a derivative of G2192 (ἔχω) (meaning a vehicle);</source>
G3793.meaning: <meaning><def>a throng</def> (as borne along); by implication, the rabble; by extension, a class of people; figuratively, a riot</meaning>

G3794.source: <source>from a remote derivative of G2192 (ἔχω) (meaning to fortify, through the idea of holding safely);</source>

G3795.source: <source>neuter of a presumed derivative of the base of G3702 (ὀπτός);</source>
G3795.meaning: <meaning><def>a relish to other food</def> (as if cooked sauce), i.e. (specially), fish (presumably salted and dried as a condiment)</meaning>

G3796.source: <source>from the same as G3694 (ὀπίσω) (through the idea of backwardness);</source>
G3796.meaning: <meaning><def>(adverbially) late in the day</def>; by extension, after the close of the day</meaning>

G3798.meaning: <meaning><def>late</def>; feminine (as noun) afternoon (early eve) or nightfall (later eve)</meaning>

G3799.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, sight (the act), i.e. (by implication) the visage, an external show</meaning>

G3800.source: <source>neuter of a presumed derivative of the same as G3795 (ὀψάριον);</source>
G3800.meaning: <meaning><def>rations for a soldier</def>, i.e. (by extension) his stipend or pay</meaning>

w.pron: ho ṑn kaí ho ēn kaí ho erchómenos
w.xlit: ho ṑn kaí ho ēn kaí ho erchómenos
w.w: ὁ ὢν καί ὁ ἦν καί ὁ ἐρχόμενος

G3801.source: <source>a phrase combining G3588 (ὁ) with the present participle and imperfect of G1510 (εἰμί) and the present participle of G2064 (ἔρχομαι) by means of G2532 (καί);</source>
G3801.meaning: <meaning><def>the one being and the one that was and the one coming</def>, i.e. the Eternal, as a divine epithet of Christ</meaning>
G3801.usage: <usage>which art (is, was), and (which) wast (is, was), and art (is) to come (shalt be).</usage>

G3803.meaning: <meaning><def>a trap</def> (as fastened by a noose or notch); figuratively, a trick or statagem (temptation)</meaning>

G3804.meaning: <meaning><def>something undergone</def>, i.e. hardship or pain; subjectively, an emotion or influence</meaning>

G3807.source: <source>from G3816 (παῖς) and a reduplicated form of G71 (ἄγω);</source>
G3807.meaning: <meaning><def>a boy-leader</def>, i.e. a servant whose office it was to take the children to school; (by implication, (figuratively) a tutor ("pædagogue"))</meaning>

G3808.source: <source>neuter of a presumed derivative of G3816 (παῖς);</source>

G3809.meaning: <meaning><def>tutorage</def>, i.e. education or training; by implication, disciplinary correction</meaning>

G3810.meaning: <meaning><def>a trainer</def>, i.e. teacher or (by implication) discipliner</meaning>

G3811.meaning: <meaning><def>to train up a child</def>, i.e. educate, or (by implication), discipline (by punishment)</meaning>

G3813.meaning: <meaning><def>a childling</def> (of either sex), i.e. (properly), an infant, or (by extension) a half-grown boy or girl; figuratively, an immature Christian</meaning>

G3814.meaning: <meaning><def>a girl</def>, i.e. (specially), a female slave or servant</meaning>

G3816.meaning: <meaning><def>a boy</def> (as often beaten with impunity), or (by analogy), a girl, and (genitive case) a child; specially, a slave or servant (especially a minister to a king; and by eminence to God)</meaning>

G3817.meaning: <meaning><def>to hit</def> (as if by a single blow and less violently than G5180 (τύπτω)); specially, to sting (as a scorpion)</meaning>

G3818.source: <source>feminine of an adjective of uncertain derivation;</source>

G3819.source: <source>probably another form for G3825 (πάλιν) (through the idea of retrocession);</source>
G3819.meaning: <meaning><def>(adverbially) formerly</def>, or (by relatively) sometime since; (elliptically as adjective) ancient</meaning>
G3819.usage: <usage>any while, a great while ago, (of) old, in time past.</usage>

G3822.meaning: <meaning><def>to make</def> (passively, become) worn out, or declare obsolete</meaning>

G3824.meaning: <meaning><def>(spiritual) rebirth</def> (the state or the act), i.e. (figuratively) spiritual renovation; specially, Messianic restoration</meaning>

G3825.source: <source>probably from the same as G3823 (πάλη) (through the idea of oscillatory repetition);</source>
G3825.meaning: <meaning><def>(adverbially) anew</def>, i.e. (of place) back, (of time) once more, or (conjunctionally) furthermore or on the other hand</meaning>

G3826.source: <source>dative case (adverb) of a compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and G4128 (πλῆθος);</source>
G3826.meaning: <meaning><def>in full multitude</def>, i.e. concertedly or simultaneously</meaning>

G3828.source: <source>from a compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and G4443 (πυρά);</source>
G3828.meaning: <meaning><def>every-tribal</def>, i.e. heterogeneous (G5561 (χώρα) being implied); Pamphylia, a region of Asia Minor</meaning>

G3829.source: <source>neuter of a presumed compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and a derivative of G1209 (δέχομαι);</source>
G3829.meaning: <meaning><def>all-receptive</def>, i.e. a public lodging-place (caravanserai or khan)</meaning>

G3831.source: <source>from G3956 (πᾶς) and a derivative of G58 (ἀγορά);</source>

G3833.source: <source>from a compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and G3696 (ὅπλον);</source>

G3834.meaning: <meaning><def>adroitness</def>, i.e. (in a bad sense) trickery or sophistry</meaning>

G3837.source: <source>genitive case (as adverb of place) of a presumed derivative of G3956 (πᾶς);</source>

G3841.meaning: <meaning><def>the all-ruling</def>, i.e. God (as absolute and universal sovereign)</meaning>

G3843.meaning: <meaning><def>entirely</def>; specially, at all events, (with negative, following) in no event</meaning>
G3843.usage: <usage>by all means, altogether, at all, needs, no doubt, in (no) wise, surely.</usage>

G3844.meaning: <meaning><def>properly</def>, near; i.e. (with genitive case) from beside (literally or figuratively), (with dative case) at (or in) the vicinity of (objectively or subjectively), (with accusative case) to the proximity with (local (especially beyond or opposed to) or causal (on account of)</meaning>
G3844.usage: <usage>above, against, among, at, before, by, contrary to, X friend, from, + give (such things as they), + that (she) had, X his, in, more than, nigh unto, (out) of, past, save, side…by, in the sight of, than, (there-)fore, with.</usage>

G3845.source: <source>from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G939 (βάσις);</source>
G3845.meaning: <meaning><def>to go contrary to</def>, i.e. violate a command</meaning>

G3846.meaning: <meaning><def>to throw alongside</def>, i.e. (reflexively) to reach a place, or (figuratively) to liken</meaning>

G3849.source: <source>from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G971 (βιάζω);</source>
G3849.meaning: <meaning><def>to force contrary to</def> (nature), i.e. compel (by entreaty)</meaning>

G3850.meaning: <meaning><def>a similitude</def> ("parable"), i.e. (symbolic) fictitious narrative (of common life conveying a moral), apothegm or adage</meaning>

G3851.source: <source>from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G1011 (βουλεύω);</source>

G3853.source: <source>from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος);</source>
G3853.meaning: <meaning><def>to transmit a message</def>, i.e. (by implication) to enjoin</meaning>

G3854.meaning: <meaning><def>to become near</def>, i.e. approach (have arrived); by implication, to appear publicly</meaning>

G3855.meaning: <meaning><def>to lead near</def>, i.e. (reflexively or intransitively) to go along or away</meaning>

G3856.meaning: <meaning><def>to show alongside</def> (the public), i.e. expose to infamy</meaning>
G3856.usage: <usage>make a public example, put to an open shame.</usage>

G3857.meaning: <meaning><def>a park</def>, i.e. (specially), an Eden (place of future happiness, "paradise")</meaning>

G3858.meaning: <meaning><def>to accept near</def>, i.e. admit or (by implication) delight in</meaning>

G3859.source: <source>from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G1304 (διατρίβω);</source>

G3860.meaning: <meaning><def>to surrender</def>, i.e yield up, intrust, transmit</meaning>
G3860.usage: <usage>betray, bring forth, cast, commit, deliver (up), give (over, up), hazard, put in prison, recommend.</usage>

G3861.source: <source>from G3844 (παρά) and G1391 (δόξα) (in the sense of seeming);</source>

G3862.meaning: <meaning><def>transmission</def>, i.e. (concretely) a precept; specially, the Jewish traditionary law</meaning>

G3863.meaning: <meaning><def>to stimulate alongside</def>, i.e. excite to rivalry</meaning>

G3867.meaning: <meaning><def>to mispraise</def>, i.e. recommend or advise (a different course)</meaning>

G4138.meaning: <meaning><def>repletion or completion</def>, i.e. (subjectively) what fills (as contents, supplement, copiousness, multitude), or (objectively) what is filled (as container, performance, period)</meaning>

G4139.meaning: <meaning><def>(adverbially) close by</def>; as noun, a neighbor, i.e. fellow (as man, countryman, Christian or friend)</meaning>

G4141.source: <source>apparently another form of G4111 (πλάσσω) (through the idea of flattening out);</source>

G4142.source: <source>neuter of a presumed derivative of G4143 (πλοῖον);</source>

G4147.usage: <usage>be increased with goods, (be made, wax) rich.</usage>

G4149.meaning: <meaning><def>wealth</def> (as fulness), i.e. (literally) money, possessions, or (figuratively) abundance, richness, (specially), valuable bestowment</meaning>

G4151.meaning: <meaning><def>a current of air</def>, i.e. breath (blast) or a breeze; by analogy or figuratively, a spirit, i.e. (human) the rational soul, (by implication) vital principle, mental disposition, etc., or (superhuman) an angel, demon, or (divine) God, Christ's spirit, the Holy Spirit</meaning>

G4152.meaning: <meaning><def>non-carnal</def>, i.e. (humanly) ethereal (as opposed to gross), or (dæmoniacally) a spirit (concretely), or (divinely) supernatural, regenerate, religious</meaning>

G4155.meaning: <meaning><def>to wheeze</def>, i.e. (causative, by implication) to throttle or strangle (drown)</meaning>

G4156.meaning: <meaning><def>throttled</def>, i.e. (neuter concretely) an animal choked to death (not bled)</meaning>

G4158.source: <source>from G4228 (πούς) and another element of uncertain affinity;</source>

G4159.source: <source>from the base of G4213 (πόσις) with enclitic adverb of origin;</source>
G4159.meaning: <meaning><def>from which</def> (as interrogative) or what (as relative) place, state, source or cause</meaning>

G4160.source: <source>apparently a prolonged form of an obsolete primary;</source>
G4160.meaning: <meaning><def>to make or do</def> (in a very wide application, more or less direct)</meaning>
G4160.usage: <usage>abide, + agree, appoint, X avenge, + band together, be, bear, + bewray, bring (forth), cast out, cause, commit, + content, continue, deal, + without any delay, (would) do(-ing), execute, exercise, fulfil, gain, give, have, hold, X journeying, keep, + lay wait, + lighten the ship, make, X mean, + none of these things move me, observe, ordain, perform, provide, + have purged, purpose, put, + raising up, X secure, shew, X shoot out, spend, take, tarry, + transgress the law, work, yield.</usage>

G4165.meaning: <meaning><def>to tend as a shepherd of</def> (figuratively, superviser)</meaning>

G4168.source: <source>neuter of a presumed derivative of G4167 (ποίμνη);</source>

G4169.source: <source>from the base of G4226 (ποῦ) and G3634 (οἷος);</source>
G4169.meaning: <meaning><def>individualizing interrogative</def> (of character) what sort of, or (of number) which one</meaning>

G4170.meaning: <meaning><def>to be</def> (engaged) in warfare, i.e. to battle (literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G4171.meaning: <meaning><def>warfare</def> (literally or figuratively; a single encounter or a series)</meaning>

G4172.source: <source>probably from the same as G4171 (πόλεμος), or perhaps from G4183 (πολύς);</source>
G4172.meaning: <meaning><def>a town</def> (properly, with walls, of greater or less size)</meaning>

G4176.source: <source>middle voice of a derivative of G4177 (πολίτης);</source>

G4179.source: <source>from G4183 (πολύς) and probably a derivative of G4120 (πλέκω);</source>
G4179.meaning: <meaning><def>manifold</def>, i.e. (neuter as noun) very much more</meaning>

G4180.source: <source>from a compound of G4183 (πολύς) and G3056 (λόγος);</source>

G4181.source: <source>adverb from a compound of G4183 (πολύς) and G3313 (μέρος);</source>
G4181.meaning: <meaning><def>in many portions</def>, i.e. variously as to time and agency (piecemeal)</meaning>

G4183.meaning: <meaning><def>(singular) much</def> (in any respect) or (plural) many; neuter (singular) as adverbial, largely; neuter (plural) as adverb or noun often, mostly, largely</meaning>
G4183.usage: <usage>abundant, + altogether, common, + far (passed, spent), (+ be of a) great (age, deal, -ly, while), long, many, much, oft(-en (-times)), plenteous, sore, straitly.</usage>

G4187.source: <source>adverb from a compound of G4183 (πολύς) and G5158 (τρόπος);</source>
G4187.meaning: <meaning><def>in many ways</def>, i.e. variously as to method or form</meaning>

G4190.meaning: <meaning><def>hurtful</def>, i.e. evil (properly, in effect or influence, and thus differing from G2556 (κακός), which refers rather to essential character, as well as from G4550 (σαπρός), which indicates degeneracy from original virtue); figuratively, calamitous; also (passively) ill, i.e. diseased; but especially (morally) culpable, i.e. derelict, vicious, facinorous; neuter (singular) mischief, malice, or (plural) guilt; masculine (singular) the devil, or (plural) sinners</meaning>
G4190.usage: <usage>bad, evil, grievous, harm, lewd, malicious, wicked(-ness).</usage>

G4195.meaning: <meaning><def>a sea</def>; Pontus, a region of Asia Minor</meaning>

G4198.source: <source>middle voice from a derivative of the same as G3984 (πεῖρα);</source>
G4198.meaning: <meaning><def>to traverse</def>, i.e. travel (literally or figuratively; especially to remove (figuratively, die), live, etc.);</meaning>
G4198.usage: <usage>--depart, go (away, forth, one's way, up), (make a, take a) journey, walk.</usage>

G4200.source: <source>from a derivative of (a way, i.e. means);</source>

G4203.meaning: <meaning><def>to act the harlot</def>, i.e. (literally) indulge unlawful lust (of either sex), or (figuratively) practise idolatry</meaning>

G4205.meaning: <meaning><def>akin to the base of G4097</def> (πιπράσκω)); a (male) prostitute (as venal), i.e. (by analogy) a debauchee (libertine)</meaning>

G4207.source: <source>from G4206 (πόῤῥω) with adverbial enclitic of source;</source>
G4207.meaning: <meaning><def>from far</def>, or (by implication) at a distance, i.e. distantly</meaning>

G4209.meaning: <meaning><def>the "purple" mussel</def>, i.e. (by implication) the red-blue color itself, and finally a garment dyed with it</meaning>

G4211.source: <source>feminine of a compound of G4209 (πορφύρα) and G4453 (πωλέω);</source>

G4214.meaning: <meaning><def>interrogative pronoun</def> (of amount) how much (large, long or (plural) many)</meaning>

G4215.source: <source>probably from a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω) (compare G4224 (πότος));</source>
G4215.meaning: <meaning><def>a current</def>, brook or freshet (as drinkable), i.e. running water</meaning>

G4216.source: <source>from G4215 (ποταμός) and a derivative of G5409 (φορέω);</source>

G4217.source: <source>apparently from G4219 (πότε) and the base of G4226 (ποῦ);</source>
G4217.meaning: <meaning><def>interrogatively</def>, whatever, i.e. of what possible sort</meaning>

G4218.source: <source>from the base of G4225 (πού) and G5037 (τέ);</source>
G4218.usage: <usage>afore-(any, some-)time(-s), at length (the last), (+ n- )ever, in the old time, in time past, once, when.</usage>

G4219.source: <source>from the base of G4226 (ποῦ) and G5037 (τέ);</source>

G4220.source: <source>neuter of a comparative of the base of G4226 (ποῦ);</source>
G4220.meaning: <meaning><def>interrogative as adverb</def>, which (of two), i.e. is it this or that</meaning>

G4221.source: <source>neuter of a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω);</source>
G4221.meaning: <meaning><def>a drinking-vessel</def>; by extension, the contents thereof, i.e. a cupful (draught); figuratively, a lot or fate</meaning>

G4222.source: <source>from a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω);</source>

G4223.meaning: <meaning><def>little wells</def>, i.e. mineral springs; Potioli (i.e. Puteoli), a place in Italy</meaning>

G4225.source: <source>genitive case of an indefinite pronoun (some) otherwise obsolete (compare G4214 (πόσος));</source>
G4225.meaning: <meaning><def>as adverb of place</def>, somewhere, i.e. nearly</meaning>

G4226.source: <source>genitive case of an interrogative pronoun (what) otherwise obsolete (perhaps the same as G4225 (πού) used with the rising slide of inquiry);</source>
G4226.meaning: <meaning><def>as adverb of place</def>; at (by implication, to) what locality</meaning>

G4229.meaning: <meaning><def>a deed</def>; by implication, an affair; by extension, an object (material)</meaning>

G4231.meaning: <meaning><def>to busy oneself with</def>, i.e. to trade</meaning>

G4232.meaning: <meaning><def>the prætorium or governor's courtroom</def> (sometimes including the whole edifice and camp)</meaning>

G4234.meaning: <meaning><def>practice</def>, i.e. (concretely) an act; by extension, a function</meaning>

G4235.source: <source>a form of G4239 (πραΰς), used in certain parts;</source>

G4237.source: <source>perhaps from (a leek, and so an onion-patch);</source>
G4237.meaning: <meaning><def>a garden plot</def>, i.e. (by implication, of regular beds) a row (repeated in plural by Hebraism, to indicate an arrangement)</meaning>

G4238.meaning: <meaning><def>to "practise"</def>, i.e. perform repeatedly or habitually (thus differing from G4160 (ποιέω), which properly refers to a single act); by implication, to execute, accomplish, etc.; specially, to collect (dues), fare (personally)</meaning>
G4238.usage: <usage>commit, deeds, do, exact, keep, require, use arts.</usage>

G4241.meaning: <meaning><def>to tower up</def> (be conspicuous), i.e. (by implication) to be suitable or proper (third person singular present indicative, often used impersonally, it is fit or right)</meaning>

G4243.meaning: <meaning><def>to be a senior</def>, i.e. (by implication) act as a representative (figuratively, preacher)</meaning>

G4244.source: <source>neuter of a presumed derivative of G4245 (πρεσβύτερος);</source>
G4244.meaning: <meaning><def>the order of elders</def>, i.e. (specially), Israelite Sanhedrin or Christian "presbytery"</meaning>

G4245.meaning: <meaning><def>older</def>; as noun, a senior; specially, an Israelite Sanhedrist (also figuratively, member of the celestial council) or Christian "presbyter"</meaning>

G4249.source: <source>a strengthened form of a primary prio (to saw);</source>

G4251.meaning: <meaning><def>feminine of Priscus</def>, ancient; Priska, a Christian woman</meaning>

G4253.meaning: <meaning><def>"fore"</def>, i.e. in front of, prior (figuratively, superior) to</meaning>

G4254.meaning: <meaning><def>to lead forward</def> (magisterially); intransitively, to precede (in place or time (participle, previous))</meaning>

G4255.meaning: <meaning><def>to choose for oneself before another thing</def> (prefer), i.e. (by implication) to propose (intend)</meaning>

G4256.source: <source>from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G156 (αἰτία);</source>

G4259.source: <source>neuter of a presumed compound of G4253 (πρό) and G833 (αὐλή);</source>

G4260.source: <source>from G4253 (πρό) and the base of G939 (βάσις);</source>
G4260.meaning: <meaning><def>to walk forward</def>, i.e. advance (literally, or in years)</meaning>
G4260.usage: <usage>+ be of a great age, go farther (on), be well stricken.</usage>

G4261.meaning: <meaning><def>to throw forward</def>, i.e. push to the front, germinate</meaning>

G4262.meaning: <meaning><def>relating to sheep</def>, i.e. (a gate) through which they were led into Jerusalem</meaning>

G4263.source: <source>probably neuter of a presumed derivative of G4260 (προβαίνω);</source>
G4263.meaning: <meaning><def>something that walks forward</def> (a quadruped), i.e. (specially), a sheep (literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G4264.source: <source>from G4253 (πρό) and a reduplicated form of G971 (βιάζω);</source>
G4264.meaning: <meaning><def>to force forward</def>, i.e. bring to the front, instigate</meaning>

G4265.meaning: <meaning><def>to look out beforehand</def>, i.e. furnish in advance</meaning>

G4266.meaning: <meaning><def>to be already</def>, i.e. have previousy transpired</meaning>

G4270.meaning: <meaning><def>to write previously</def>; figuratively, to announce, prescribe</meaning>
G4270.usage: <usage>before ordain, evidently set forth, write (afore, aforetime).</usage>

G4272.meaning: <meaning><def>to give before the other party has given</def></meaning>

G4273.source: <source>from G4272 (προδίδωμι) (in the sense of giving forward into another's (the enemy's) hands);</source>

G4276.meaning: <meaning><def>to hope in advance of other confirmation</def></meaning>

G4280.meaning: <meaning><def>used as alternate of G4277</def> (προέπω); to say already, predict</meaning>

G4281.meaning: <meaning><def>to go onward</def>, precede (in place or time)</meaning>

G4282.meaning: <meaning><def>to fit up in advance</def> (literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G4284.meaning: <meaning><def>to hold oneself before others</def>, i.e. (figuratively) to excel</meaning>

G4285.meaning: <meaning><def>to lead the way for others</def>, i.e. show deference</meaning>

G4286.meaning: <meaning><def>a setting forth</def>, i.e. (figuratively) proposal (intention); specially, the show-bread (in the Temple) as exposed before God</meaning>

G4287.source: <source>from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι);</source>
G4287.meaning: <meaning><def>fixed beforehand</def>, i.e. (feminine with G2250 (ἡμέρα) implied) a designated day</meaning>

G4288.usage: <usage>forwardness of mind, readiness (of mind), ready (willing) mind.</usage>

G4289.meaning: <meaning><def>forward in spirit</def>, i.e. predisposed; neuter (as noun) alacrity</meaning>

G4291.meaning: <meaning><def>to stand before</def>, i.e. (in rank) to preside, or (by implication) to practise</meaning>

G4292.meaning: <meaning><def>to call forth to oneself</def> (challenge), i.e. (by implication) to irritate</meaning>

G4295.meaning: <meaning><def>to lie before the view</def>, i.e. (figuratively) to be present (to the mind), to stand forth (as an example or reward)</meaning>

G4298.meaning: <meaning><def>to drive forward</def> (as if by beating), i.e. (figuratively and intransitively) to advance (in amount, to grow; in time, to be well along)</meaning>
G4298.usage: <usage>increase, proceed, profit, be far spent, wax.</usage>

G4299.source: <source>from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G2919 (κρίνω);</source>

G4301.meaning: <meaning><def>to take in advance</def>, i.e. (literally) eat before others have an opportunity; (figuratively) to anticipate, surprise</meaning>

G4303.meaning: <meaning><def>to be a witness in advance i.e. predict</def></meaning>

G4306.meaning: <meaning><def>to consider in advance</def>, i.e. look out for beforehand (actively, by way of maintenance for others; middle voice by way of circumspection for oneself)</meaning>

G4308.meaning: <meaning><def>to behold in advance</def>, i.e. (actively) to notice (another) previously, or (middle voice) to keep in (one's own) view</meaning>

G4311.meaning: <meaning><def>to send forward</def>, i.e. escort or aid in travel</meaning>

G4312.source: <source>from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G4098 (πίπτω);</source>

G4314.meaning: <meaning><def>a preposition of direction</def>; forward to, i.e. toward (with the genitive case, the side of, i.e. pertaining to; with the dative case, by the side of, i.e. near to; usually with the accusative case, the place, time, occasion, or respect, which is the destination of the relation, i.e. whither or for which it is predicated)</meaning>
G4314.usage: <usage>about, according to , against, among, at, because of, before, between, (where-)by, for, X at thy house, in, for intent, nigh unto, of, which pertain to, that, to (the end that), X together, to (you) -ward, unto, with(-in).</usage>

G4316.source: <source>from G4314 (πρός) and a derivative of G58 (ἀγορά) (mean to harangue);</source>

G4320.meaning: <meaning><def>to ascend farther</def>, i.e. be promoted (take an upper (more honorable) seat)</meaning>

G4322.meaning: <meaning><def>to fill up further</def>, i.e. furnish fully</meaning>

G4323.meaning: <meaning><def>to lay up in addition</def>, i.e. (middle voice and figuratively) to impart or (by implication) to consult</meaning>

G4327.meaning: <meaning><def>to admit</def> (to intercourse, hospitality, credence, or (figuratively) endurance); by implication, to await (with confidence or patience)</meaning>

G4328.meaning: <meaning><def>to anticipate</def> (in thought, hope or fear); by implication, to await</meaning>
G4328.usage: <usage>(be in) expect(-ation), look (for), when looked, tarry, wait for.</usage>

G4332.source: <source>from a compound of G4314 (πρός) and the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος);</source>
G4332.meaning: <meaning><def>to sit near</def>, i.e. attend as a servant</meaning>

G4333.meaning: <meaning><def>to work additionally</def>, i.e. (by implication) acquire besides</meaning>

G4334.meaning: <meaning><def>to approach</def>, i.e. (literally) come near, visit, or (figuratively) worship, assent to</meaning>
G4334.usage: <usage>(as soon as he) come (unto), come thereunto, consent, draw near, go (near, to, unto).</usage>

G4336.meaning: <meaning><def>to pray to God</def>, i.e. supplicate, worship</meaning>

G4337.meaning: <meaning><def>(figuratively) to hold the mind</def> (3563 implied) towards, i.e. pay attention to, be cautious about, apply oneself to, adhere to</meaning>
G4337.usage: <usage>(give) attend(-ance, -ance at, -ance to, unto), beware, be given to, give (take) heed (to unto); have regard.</usage>

G4338.source: <source>from G4314 (πρός) and a derivative of G2247 (ἧλος);</source>

G4339.meaning: <meaning><def>an arriver from a foreign region</def>, i.e. (specially), an acceder (convert) to Judaism ("proselyte")</meaning>

G4340.usage: <usage>dur-(eth) for awhile, endure for a time, for a season, temporal.</usage>

G4341.meaning: <meaning><def>to call toward oneself</def>, i.e. summon, invite</meaning>

G4342.meaning: <meaning><def>to be earnest towards</def>, i.e. (to a thing) to persevere, be constantly diligent, or (in a place) to attend assiduously all the exercises, or (to a person) to adhere closely to (as a servitor)</meaning>

G4344.source: <source>neuter of a presumed compound of G4314 (πρός) and G2776 (κεφαλή);</source>
G4344.meaning: <meaning><def>something for the head</def>, i.e. a cushion</meaning>

G4345.meaning: <meaning><def>to give a common lot to</def>, i.e. (figuratively) to associate with</meaning>

G4346.source: <source>from a compound of G4314 (πρός) and G2827 (κλίνω);</source>

G4349.meaning: <meaning><def>a stumbling</def>, i.e. (figuratively and concretely) occasion of sin</meaning>

G4350.meaning: <meaning><def>to strike at</def>, i.e. surge against (as water); specially, to stub on, i.e. trip up (literally or figuratively)</meaning>

G4352.source: <source>from G4314 (πρός) and a probable derivative of G2965 (κύων) (meaning to kiss, like a dog licking his master's hand);</source>
